revision.comment: Text replacement - "other_designation Designation" to "other_designation "
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:01, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Multiple Issues | Refs Needed = June 2023 | Single Source = June 2023 }} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Kōshinzuka Kofun |image = [[File:庚申塚古墳１.jpg|250px|Full view of Kōshinzuka Kofun]] |location = {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}{{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町}} Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1 |location = {{coord|36|43|22|N|138|15|01|E|map_size:20000}} |type = {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} |built = Early {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}} |area = Total length: approx. 52m; Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m |Buried Person = Unknown |burial goods = Gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}} ({{ill|Cylindrical Haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa}}) |other_designation = Town (formerly village) designation1 in [[1980]] (Showa 55) }} '''Kōshinzuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳) is a {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} located in {{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}.
The mound is named "Kōshinzuka" because an ancient {{ill|Kōshin-tō|ja|庚申塔}} was enshrined on it. In [[1933]] (Showa 8), Eiji Kuriiwa conducted an investigation and identified the site as a keyhole-shaped Kofun.
The mound, believed to have been constructed in the early {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}}, yielded burial goods including gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}} (cylindrical Haniwa), marking it as the sixth example of such finds in Japan.
== Overview ==
* type: {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} * area: ** Total length: approx. 52m ** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m ** Rear circle height: 3.5m ** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m ** Front projection height: 1.5m
<gallery widths="200px"> 庚申塚古墳２.jpg|Close view of Kōshinzuka Kofun 庚申塚古墳３.jpg|Stone monument 庚申塚古墳４.jpg|Kōshin-tō </gallery>
== location ==
* Nagano Prefecture, Kamiminochi District, {{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町}}, Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1
== Transportation Access ==
* Nearest Station: {{ill|Shinano Railway|ja|しなの鉄道}} {{ill|Mure Station|ja|牟礼駅}} (Approx. 8 minutes by car)
== References ==
* Mure Village History and School History Compilation Committee, *Mure Village History* (Vol. 1), pp. 419–420, 817.== See Also ==
* {{ill|Tankakyō|ja|丹霞郷}} * {{ill|List of Kofuns in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧}}

* type: {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} * area: ** Total length: approx. 52m ** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m ** Rear circle height: 3.5m ** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m ** Front projection height: 1.5m

{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:01, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Multiple Issues | Refs Needed = June 2023 | Single Source = June 2023 }} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Kōshinzuka Kofun |image = [[File:庚申塚古墳１.jpg|250px|Full view of Kōshinzuka Kofun]] |location = {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}{{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町}} Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1 |location = {{coord|36|43|22|N|138|15|01|E|map_size:20000}} |type = {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} |built = Early {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}} |area = Total length: approx. 52m; Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m |Buried Person = Unknown |burial goods = Gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}} ({{ill|Cylindrical Haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa}}) |other_other_designation Designation = Town (typeerly village) other_designation1 in [[1980]] (Showa 55) }} '''Kōshinzuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳) is a {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} located in {{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}.
The mound is named "Kōshinzuka" because an ancient {{ill|Kōshin-tō|ja|庚申塔}} was enshrined on it. In [[1933]] (Showa 8), Eiji Kuriiwa conducted an investigation and identified the site as a keyhole-shaped Kofun.
The mound, believed to have been constructed in the early {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}}, yielded burial goods including gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}} (cylindrical Haniwa), marking it as the sixth example of such finds in Japan.
== Overview ==
* type: {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} * area: ** Total length: approx. 52m ** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m ** Rear circle height: 3.5m ** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m ** Front projection height: 1.5m
<gallery widths="200px"> 庚申塚古墳２.jpg|Close view of Kōshinzuka Kofun 庚申塚古墳３.jpg|Stone monument 庚申塚古墳４.jpg|Kōshin-tō </gallery>
== location ==
* Nagano Prefecture, Kamiminochi District, {{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町}}, Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1
== Transportation Access ==
* Nearest Station: {{ill|Shinano Railway|ja|しなの鉄道}} {{ill|Mure Station|ja|牟礼駅}} (Approx. 8 minutes by car)
== References ==
* Mure Village History and School History Compilation Committee, *Mure Village History* (Vol. 1), pp. 419–420, 817.== See Also ==
* {{ill|Tankakyō|ja|丹霞郷}} * {{ill|List of Kofuns in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧}}

The mound, believed to have been constructed in the early {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}}, yielded burial goods including gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}} (cylindrical Haniwa), marking it as the sixth example of such finds in Japan.

* type: {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} * area: ** Total length: approx. 52m ** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m ** Rear circle height: 3.5m ** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m ** Front projection height: 1.5m

{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:01, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Multiple Issues | Refs Needed = June 2023 | Single Source = June 2023 }} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Kōshinzuka Kofun |image = [[File:庚申塚古墳１.jpg|250px|Full view of Kōshinzuka Kofun]] |location = {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}{{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町}} Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1 |location = {{coord|36|43|22|N|138|15|01|E|map_size:20000}} |type = {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} |built = Early {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}} |area = Total length: approx. 52m; Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m |Buried Person = Unknown |burial goods = Gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}} ({{ill|Cylindrical Haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa}}) |other_designation Designation = Town (typeerly village) other_designation1 in [[1980]] (Showa 55) }} '''Kōshinzuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳) is a {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} located in {{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}.
The mound is named "Kōshinzuka" because an ancient {{ill|Kōshin-tō|ja|庚申塔}} was enshrined on it. In [[1933]] (Showa 8), Eiji Kuriiwa conducted an investigation and identified the site as a keyhole-shaped Kofun.
The mound, believed to have been constructed in the early {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}}, yielded burial goods including gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}} (cylindrical Haniwa), marking it as the sixth example of such finds in Japan.
== Overview ==
* type: {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} * area: ** Total length: approx. 52m ** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m ** Rear circle height: 3.5m ** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m ** Front projection height: 1.5m
<gallery widths="200px"> 庚申塚古墳２.jpg|Close view of Kōshinzuka Kofun 庚申塚古墳３.jpg|Stone monument 庚申塚古墳４.jpg|Kōshin-tō </gallery>
== location ==
* Nagano Prefecture, Kamiminochi District, {{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町}}, Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1
== Transportation Access ==
* Nearest Station: {{ill|Shinano Railway|ja|しなの鉄道}} {{ill|Mure Station|ja|牟礼駅}} (Approx. 8 minutes by car)
== References ==
* Mure Village History and School History Compilation Committee, *Mure Village History* (Vol. 1), pp. 419–420, 817.== See Also ==
* {{ill|Tankakyō|ja|丹霞郷}} * {{ill|List of Kofuns in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧}}

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:01, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Multiple Issues | Refs Needed = June 2023 | Single Source = June 2023 }} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Kōshinzuka Kofun |image = [[File:庚申塚古墳１.jpg|250px|Full view of Kōshinzuka Kofun]] |location = {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}{{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町}} Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1 |location = {{coord|36|43|22|N|138|15|01|E|map_size:20000}} |type = {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} |built = Early {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}} |area = Total length: approx. 52m; Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m |Buried Person = Unknown |burial goods = Gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}} ({{ill|Cylindrical Haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa}}) |other_designation Designation = Town (typeerly village) other_designation1 in [[1980]] (Showa 55) }} '''Kōshinzuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳) is a {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} located in {{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}.
The mound is named "Kōshinzuka" because an ancient {{ill|Kōshin-tō|ja|庚申塔}} was enshrined on it. In [[1933]] (Showa 8), Eiji Kuriiwa conducted an investigation and identified the site as a keyhole-shaped Kofun.
The mound, believed to have been constructed in the early {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}}, yielded burial goods including gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}} (cylindrical Haniwa), marking it as the sixth example of such finds in Japan.
== Overview ==
* type: {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} * area: ** Total length: approx. 52m ** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m ** Rear circle height: 3.5m ** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m ** Front projection height: 1.5m
<gallery widths="200px"> 庚申塚古墳２.jpg|Close view of Kōshinzuka Kofun 庚申塚古墳３.jpg|Stone monument 庚申塚古墳４.jpg|Kōshin-tō </gallery>
== location ==
* Nagano Prefecture, Kamiminochi District, {{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町}}, Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1
== Transportation Access ==
* Nearest Station: {{ill|Shinano Railway|ja|しなの鉄道}} {{ill|Mure Station|ja|牟礼駅}} (Approx. 8 minutes by car)
== References ==
* Mure Village History and School History Compilation Committee, *Mure Village History* (Vol. 1), pp. 419–420, 817.== See Also ==
* {{ill|Tankakyō|ja|丹霞郷}} * {{ill|List of Kofuns in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧}}

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:01, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Multiple Issues | Refs Needed = June 2023 | Single Source = June 2023 }} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Kōshinzuka Kofun |image = [[File:庚申塚古墳１.jpg|250px|Full view of Kōshinzuka Kofun]] |location = {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}{{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町}} Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1 |location = {{coord|36|43|22|N|138|15|01|E|map_size:20000}} |type = {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} |built = Early {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}} |area = Total length: approx. 52m; Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m |Buried Person = Unknown |burial goods = Gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}} ({{ill|Cylindrical Haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa}}) |other_designation Designation = Town (typeerly village) other_designation1 in [[1980]] (Showa 55) }} '''Kōshinzuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳) is a {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} located in {{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}.
The mound is named "Kōshinzuka" because an ancient {{ill|Kōshin-tō|ja|庚申塔}} was enshrined on it. In [[1933]] (Showa 8), Eiji Kuriiwa conducted an investigation and identified the site as a keyhole-shaped Kofun.
The mound, believed to have been constructed in the early {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}}, yielded burial goods including gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}} (cylindrical Haniwa), marking it as the sixth example of such finds in Japan.
== Overview ==
* type: {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} * area: ** Total length: approx. 52m ** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m ** Rear circle height: 3.5m ** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m ** Front projection height: 1.5m
<gallery widths="200px"> 庚申塚古墳２.jpg|Close view of Kōshinzuka Kofun 庚申塚古墳３.jpg|Stone monument 庚申塚古墳４.jpg|Kōshin-tō </gallery>
== location ==
* Nagano Prefecture, Kamiminochi District, {{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町}}, Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1
== Transportation Access ==
* Nearest Station: {{ill|Shinano Railway|ja|しなの鉄道}} {{ill|Mure Station|ja|牟礼駅}} (Approx. 8 minutes by car)
== References ==
* Mure Village History and School History Compilation Committee, *Mure Village History* (Vol. 1), pp. 419–420, 817.== See Also ==
* {{ill|Tankakyō|ja|丹霞郷}} * {{ill|List of Kofuns in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧}}

revision.comment: mass replace on [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]]
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:01, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Multiple Issues | Refs Needed = June 2023 | Single Source = June 2023 }} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Kōshinzuka Kofun |image = [[File:庚申塚古墳１.jpg|250px|Full view of Kōshinzuka Kofun]] |location = {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}{{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町}} Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1 |location = {{coord|36|43|22|N|138|15|01|E|map_size:20000}} |type = {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} |built = Early {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}} |area = Total length: approx. 52m; Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m |Buried Person = Unknown |burial goods = Gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}} ({{ill|Cylindrical Haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa}}) |other_designation designation1 = Town (typeerly village) other_designation1 in [[1980]] (Showa 55) }} '''Kōshinzuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳) is a {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} located in {{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}.
The mound is named "Kōshinzuka" because an ancient {{ill|Kōshin-tō|ja|庚申塔}} was enshrined on it. In [[1933]] (Showa 8), Eiji Kuriiwa conducted an investigation and identified the site as a keyhole-shaped Kofun.
The mound, believed to have been constructed in the early {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}}, yielded burial goods including gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}} (cylindrical Haniwa), marking it as the sixth example of such finds in Japan.
== Overview ==
* type: {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} * area: ** Total length: approx. 52m ** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m ** Rear circle height: 3.5m ** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m ** Front projection height: 1.5m
<gallery widths="200px"> 庚申塚古墳２.jpg|Close view of Kōshinzuka Kofun 庚申塚古墳３.jpg|Stone monument 庚申塚古墳４.jpg|Kōshin-tō </gallery>
== location ==
* Nagano Prefecture, Kamiminochi District, {{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町}}, Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1
== Transportation Access ==
* Nearest Station: {{ill|Shinano Railway|ja|しなの鉄道}} {{ill|Mure Station|ja|牟礼駅}} (Approx. 8 minutes by car)
== References ==
* Mure Village History and School History Compilation Committee, *Mure Village History* (Vol. 1), pp. 419–420, 817.== See Also ==
* {{ill|Tankakyō|ja|丹霞郷}} * {{ill|List of Kofuns in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧}}

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]] on (CatAlot)
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:01, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Multiple Issues | Refs Needed = June 2023 | Single Source = June 2023 }} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Kōshinzuka Kofun |image = [[File:庚申塚古墳１.jpg|250px|Full view of Kōshinzuka Kofun]] |location = {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}{{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町}} Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1 |location = {{coord|36|43|22|N|138|15|01|E|map_size:20000}} |type = {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} |built = Early {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}} |area = Total length: approx. 52m; Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m |Buried Person = Unknown |burial goods = Gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}} ({{ill|Cylindrical Haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa}}) |other_designation designation1 = Town (typeerly village) other_designation1 in [[1980]] (Showa 55) }} '''Kōshinzuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳) is a {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} located in {{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}.
The mound is named "Kōshinzuka" because an ancient {{ill|Kōshin-tō|ja|庚申塔}} was enshrined on it. In [[1933]] (Showa 8), Eiji Kuriiwa conducted an investigation and identified the site as a keyhole-shaped Kofun.
The mound, believed to have been constructed in the early {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}}, yielded burial goods including gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}} (cylindrical Haniwa), marking it as the sixth example of such finds in Japan.
== Overview ==
* type: {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} * area: ** Total length: approx. 52m ** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m ** Rear circle height: 3.5m ** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m ** Front projection height: 1.5m
<gallery widths="200px"> 庚申塚古墳２.jpg|Close view of Kōshinzuka Kofun 庚申塚古墳３.jpg|Stone monument 庚申塚古墳４.jpg|Kōshin-tō </gallery>
== location ==
* Nagano Prefecture, Kamiminochi District, {{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町}}, Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1
== Transportation Access ==
* Nearest Station: {{ill|Shinano Railway|ja|しなの鉄道}} {{ill|Mure Station|ja|牟礼駅}} (Approx. 8 minutes by car)
== References ==
* Mure Village History and School History Compilation Committee, *Mure Village History* (Vol. 1), pp. 419–420, 817.== See Also ==
* {{ill|Tankakyō|ja|丹霞郷}} * {{ill|List of Kofuns in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧}}

revision.comment: removing duplicates of this
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:01, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Multiple Issues | Refs Needed = June 2023 | Single Source = June 2023 }} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Kōshinzuka Kofun |image = [[File:庚申塚古墳１.jpg|250px|Full view of Kōshinzuka Kofun]] |location = {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}{{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町}} Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1 |location = {{coord|36|43|22|N|138|15|01|E|map_size:20000}} |type = {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} |built = Early {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}} |area = Total length: approx. 52m; Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m |Buried Person = Unknown |burial goods = Gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}} ({{ill|Cylindrical Haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa}}) |Historic Site designation1 = Town (typeerly village) Historic Site1 in [[1980]] (Showa 55) }} '''Kōshinzuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳) is a {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} located in {{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}.
The mound is named "Kōshinzuka" because an ancient {{ill|Kōshin-tō|ja|庚申塔}} was enshrined on it. In [[1933]] (Showa 8), Eiji Kuriiwa conducted an investigation and identified the site as a keyhole-shaped Kofun.
The mound, believed to have been constructed in the early {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀}}, yielded burial goods including gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪}} (cylindrical Haniwa), marking it as the sixth example of such finds in Japan.
== Overview ==
* type: {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun}} * area: ** Total length: approx. 52m ** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m ** Rear circle height: 3.5m ** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m ** Front projection height: 1.5m
<gallery widths="200px"> 庚申塚古墳２.jpg|Close view of Kōshinzuka Kofun 庚申塚古墳３.jpg|Stone monument 庚申塚古墳４.jpg|Kōshin-tō </gallery>
== location ==
* Nagano Prefecture, Kamiminochi District, {{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町}}, Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1
== Transportation Access ==
* Nearest Station: {{ill|Shinano Railway|ja|しなの鉄道}} {{ill|Mure Station|ja|牟礼駅}} (Approx. 8 minutes by car)
== References ==
* Mure Village History and School History Compilation Committee, *Mure Village History* (Vol. 1), pp. 419–420, 817.== See Also ==
* {{ill|Tankakyō|ja|丹霞郷}} * {{ill|List of Kofuns in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧}}

{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. revision.comment: Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:01, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Multiple Issues | Refs Needed = June 2023 | Single Source = June 2023 }} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Kōshinzuka Kofun |image = [[File:庚申塚古墳１.jpg|250px|Full view of Kōshinzuka Kofun]] |location = {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|12=draft}}{{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町|12=draft}} Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1 |location = {{coord|36|43|22|N|138|15|01|E|map_size:20000}} |type = {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft}} |built = Early {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀|12=draft}} |area = Total length: approx. 52m; Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m |Buried Person = Unknown |burial goods = Gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪|12=draft}} ({{ill|Cylindrical Haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa|12=draft}}) |Historic Site designation1 = Town (typeerly village) Historic Site1 in [[1980]] (Showa 55) }} '''Kōshinzuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳) is a {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|12=draft}}.
The mound is named "Kōshinzuka" because an ancient {{ill|Kōshin-tō|ja|庚申塔|12=draft}} was enshrined on it. In [[1933]] (Showa 8), Eiji Kuriiwa conducted an investigation and identified the site as a keyhole-shaped Kofun.
The mound, believed to have been constructed in the early {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀|12=draft}}, yielded burial goods including gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪|12=draft}} (cylindrical Haniwa), marking it as the sixth example of such finds in Japan.
== Overview ==
* type: {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft}} * area: ** Total length: approx. 52m ** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m ** Rear circle height: 3.5m ** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m ** Front projection height: 1.5m
<gallery widths="200px"> 庚申塚古墳２.jpg|Close view of Kōshinzuka Kofun 庚申塚古墳３.jpg|Stone monument 庚申塚古墳４.jpg|Kōshin-tō </gallery>
== location ==
* Nagano Prefecture, Kamiminochi District, {{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町|12=draft}}, Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1
== Transportation Access ==
* Nearest Station: {{ill|Shinano Railway|ja|しなの鉄道|12=draft}} {{ill|Mure Station|ja|牟礼駅|12=draft}} (Approx. 8 minutes by car)
== References ==
* Mure Village History and School History Compilation Committee, *Mure Village History* (Vol. 1), pp. 419–420, 817.== See Also ==
* {{ill|Tankakyō|ja|丹霞郷|12=draft}} * {{ill|List of Kofuns in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=draft}}
{{Japanese-history-stub}}

* type: {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft}} * area: ** Total length: approx. 52m ** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m ** Rear circle height: 3.5m ** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m ** Front projection height: 1.5m

== Transportation Access ==

Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Multiple Issues | Refs Needed = June 2023 | Single Source = June 2023 }} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Kōshinzuka Kofun |image = [[File:庚申塚古墳１.jpg|250px|Full view of Kōshinzuka Kofun]] |location = {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|12=draft}}{{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町|12=draft}} Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1 |location = {{coord|36|43|22|N|138|15|01|E|map_size:20000}} |type = {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft}} |built = Early {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀|12=draft}} |area = Total length: approx. 52m; Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m |Buried Person = Unknown |burial goods = Gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪|12=draft}} ({{ill|Cylindrical Haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa|12=draft}}) |Historic Site designation1 = Town (typeerly village) Historic Site1 in [[1980]] (Showa 55) }} '''Kōshinzuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳) is a {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|12=draft}}.
The mound is named "Kōshinzuka" because an ancient {{ill|Kōshin-tō|ja|庚申塔|12=draft}} was enshrined on it. In [[1933]] (Showa 8), Eiji Kuriiwa conducted an investigation and identified the site as a keyhole-shaped Kofun.
The mound, believed to have been constructed in the early {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀|12=draft}}, yielded burial goods including gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪|12=draft}} (cylindrical Haniwa), marking it as the sixth example of such finds in Japan.
== Overview ==
* type: {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft}} * area: ** Total length: approx. 52m ** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m ** Rear circle height: 3.5m ** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m ** Front projection height: 1.5m
<gallery widths="200px"> 庚申塚古墳２.jpg|Close view of Kōshinzuka Kofun 庚申塚古墳３.jpg|Stone monument 庚申塚古墳４.jpg|Kōshin-tō </gallery>
== location ==
* Nagano Prefecture, Kamiminochi District, {{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町|12=draft}}, Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1
== Transportation Access ==
* Nearest Station: {{ill|Shinano Railway|ja|しなの鉄道|12=draft}} {{ill|Mure Station|ja|牟礼駅|12=draft}} (Approx. 8 minutes by car)
== References ==
* Mure Village History and School History Compilation Committee, *Mure Village History* (Vol. 1), pp. 419–420, 817. == See Also ==
* {{ill|Tankakyō|ja|丹霞郷|12=draft}} * {{ill|List of Kofuns in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=draft}}
{{Japanese-history-stub}}

The mound, believed to have been constructed in the early {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀|12=draft}}, yielded burial goods including gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪|12=draft}} (cylindrical Haniwa), marking it as the sixth example of such finds in Japan.
== Overview ==
* type: {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft}} * area: ** Total length: approx. 52m ** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m ** Rear circle height: 3.5m ** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m ** Front projection height: 1.5m
<gallery widths="200px"> 庚申塚古墳２.jpg|Close view of Kōshinzuka Kofun 庚申塚古墳３.jpg|Stone monument 庚申塚古墳４.jpg|Kōshin-tō </gallery>
== location ==
* Nagano Prefecture, Kamiminochi District, {{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町|12=draft}}, Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1
== Transportation Access ==
* Nearest Station: {{ill|Shinano Railway|ja|しなの鉄道|12=draft}} {{ill|Mure Station|ja|牟礼駅|12=draft}} (Approx. 8 minutes by car)
== References ==
* Mure Village History and School History Compilation Committee, *Mure Village History* (Vol. 1), pp. 419–420, 817. == See Also ==
* {{ill|Tankakyō|ja|丹霞郷|12=draft}} * {{ill|List of Kofuns in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=draft}}
{{Japanese-history-stub}}

* type: {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft}} * area: ** Total length: approx. 52m ** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m ** Rear circle height: 3.5m ** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m ** Front projection height: 1.5m
<gallery widths="200px"> 庚申塚古墳２.jpg|Close view of Kōshinzuka Kofun 庚申塚古墳３.jpg|Stone monument 庚申塚古墳４.jpg|Kōshin-tō </gallery>
== location ==
* Nagano Prefecture, Kamiminochi District, {{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町|12=draft}}, Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1
== Transportation Access ==
* Nearest Station: {{ill|Shinano Railway|ja|しなの鉄道|12=draft}} {{ill|Mure Station|ja|牟礼駅|12=draft}} (Approx. 8 minutes by car)
== References ==
* Mure Village History and School History Compilation Committee, *Mure Village History* (Vol. 1), pp. 419–420, 817. == See Also ==
* {{ill|Tankakyō|ja|丹霞郷|12=draft}} * {{ill|List of Kofuns in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=draft}}

{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:01, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Multiple Issues | Refs Needed = June 2023 | Single Source = June 2023 }} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Kōshinzuka Kofun |image = [[File:庚申塚古墳１.jpg|250px|Full view of Kōshinzuka Kofun]] |location = {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|12=draft}}{{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町|12=draft}} Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1 |location = {{coord|36|43|22|N|138|15|01|E|map_size:20000}} |type = {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft}} |built = Early {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀|12=draft}} |area = Total length: approx. 52m; Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m |Buried Person = Unknown |burial goods = Gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪|12=draft}} ({{ill|Cylindrical Haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa|12=draft}}) |Historic Site designation1 = Town (typeerly village) Historic Site1 in [[1980]] (Showa 55) }} '''Kōshinzuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳) is a {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県|12=draft}}.
The mound is named "Kōshinzuka" because an ancient {{ill|Kōshin-tō|ja|庚申塔|12=draft}} was enshrined on it. In [[1933]] (Showa 8), Eiji Kuriiwa conducted an investigation and identified the site as a keyhole-shaped Kofun.
The mound, believed to have been constructed in the early {{ill|5th century|ja|5世紀|12=draft}}, yielded burial goods including gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|ja|埴輪|12=draft}} (cylindrical Haniwa), marking it as the sixth example of such finds in Japan.
== Overview ==
* type: {{ill|Keyhole-shaped Kofun|ja|前方後円墳|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=draft}} * area: ** Total length: approx. 52m ** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m ** Rear circle height: 3.5m ** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m ** Front projection height: 1.5m
<gallery widths="200px"> 庚申塚古墳２.jpg|Close view of Kōshinzuka Kofun 庚申塚古墳３.jpg|Stone monument 庚申塚古墳４.jpg|Kōshin-tō </gallery>
== location ==
* Nagano Prefecture, Kamiminochi District, {{ill|Iizuna Town|ja|飯綱町|12=draft}}, Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1
== Transportation Access ==
* Nearest Station: {{ill|Shinano Railway|ja|しなの鉄道|12=draft}} {{ill|Mure Station|ja|牟礼駅|12=draft}} (Approx. 8 minutes by car)
== References ==
* Mure Village History and School History Compilation Committee, *Mure Village History* (Vol. 1), pp. 419–420, 817. == See Also ==
* {{ill|Tankakyō|ja|丹霞郷|12=draft}} * {{ill|List of Kofuns in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=draft}}

revision.text:
{{複数の問題 | 脚注の不足 = 2023年6月 | 単一の出典 = 2023年6月 }} {{日本の古墳 |名称=庚申塚古墳 |画像=[[File:庚申塚古墳１.jpg|250px|庚申塚古墳全景]] |所在地=[[長野県]][[飯綱町]]大字平出字西浦1007-1、1008-1 |位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|36|43|22|N|138|15|01|E|scale:20000}} |形状=[[前方後円墳]] |築造年代=5世紀前半 |規模=全長約52[[メートル|m]]、後円部径約31メートル |被葬者=不明 |出土品=格子目叩きの [[埴輪]]（[[円筒埴輪]]） |史跡指定=[[1980年]]（[[昭和]]55年）町（旧村）指定 }} '''庚申塚古墳'''（こうしんづかこふん）とは、[[長野県]][[飯綱町]]平出にある[[前方後円墳]]。
古くから塚の上に[[庚申塔]]が祀られていたので庚申塚と呼ばれてきた。 [[1933年]]（[[昭和]]8年）に栗岩英治が庚申塚を調査して、前方後円墳であるとした。
[[古墳時代]]（5世紀前半）築造されたと考えられる古墳で、国内6例目となる格子目叩きが施された [[埴輪]]（[[円筒埴輪]]）が出土した。
== 概要 == *墳形 - [[前方後円墳]] *規模 **全長：約52[[メートル]] **後円部径：約31メートル **後円部高さ：3.5メートル **前方部の先端の幅：約15 - 17メートル **前方部高さ：1.5メートル <gallery widths="200px"> 庚申塚古墳２.jpg|庚申塚古墳近景 庚申塚古墳３.jpg|石碑 庚申塚古墳４.jpg|庚申塔 </gallery>
== 所在地 == *長野県上水内郡飯綱町大字平出字西浦1007-1、1008-1
== 交通アクセス == *最寄駅：[[しなの鉄道]][[牟礼駅]]（車約8分）
<!-- == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} --> == 参考文献 == * 牟礼村誌・学校誌編纂委員会『牟礼村誌』上巻、419-420、817頁。
== 関連項目 == *[[丹霞郷]] *[[日本の古墳一覧]]
{{Japanese-history-stub}} {{デフォルトソート:こうしんつかこふん}} [[Category:長野県の古墳]] [[Category:飯綱町の歴史]] [[Category:前方後円墳]]

古くから塚の上に[[庚申塔]]が祀られていたので庚申塚と呼ばれてきた。 [[1933年]]（[[昭和]]8年）に栗岩英治が庚申塚を調査して、前方後円墳であるとした。
[[古墳時代]]（5世紀前半）築造されたと考えられる古墳で、国内6例目となる格子目叩きが施された [[埴輪]]（[[円筒埴輪]]）が出土した。
== 概要 == *墳形 - [[前方後円墳]] *規模 **全長：約52[[メートル]] **後円部径：約31メートル **後円部高さ：3.5メートル **前方部の先端の幅：約15 - 17メートル **前方部高さ：1.5メートル <gallery widths="200px"> 庚申塚古墳２.jpg|庚申塚古墳近景 庚申塚古墳３.jpg|石碑 庚申塚古墳４.jpg|庚申塔 </gallery>
== 所在地 == *長野県上水内郡飯綱町大字平出字西浦1007-1、1008-1
== 交通アクセス == *最寄駅：[[しなの鉄道]][[牟礼駅]]（車約8分）
<!-- == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} --> == 参考文献 == * 牟礼村誌・学校誌編纂委員会『牟礼村誌』上巻、419-420、817頁。
== 関連項目 == *[[丹霞郷]] *[[日本の古墳一覧]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Koushinzuka-kofun (Nagano-Iizuna)]][[ja:庚申塚古墳 (飯綱町)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q93325955]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:22, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:49, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}}
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:01, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}}
{{Multiple Issues | Refs Needed = June 2023 | Single Source = June 2023 }} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Kōshinzuka Kofun |image = [[File:庚申塚古墳１.jpg|250px|Full view of Kōshinzuka Kofun]] |location = [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]][[:en:Iizuna|Iizuna Town]] Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1 |location = {{coord|36|43|22|N|138|15|01|E|map_size:20000}} |type = [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] |built = Early [[:en:5th century|5th century]] |area = Total length: approx. 52m; Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m |Buried Person = Unknown |burial goods = Gri11ed [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]] ({{ill|Cylindrical Haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cylindrical Haniwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Cylindrical Haniwa|qq=}}) |Historic Site designation1 = Town (typeerly village) Historic Site1 in [[1980]] (Showa 55) }} '''Kōshinzuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳) is a [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] located in [[:en:Iizuna|Iizuna Town]], [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]].
The mound is named "Kōshinzuka" because an ancient {{ill|Kōshin-tō|ja|庚申塔|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin-tō|qq=}} was enshrined on it. In [[:en:1933|1933]] (Showa 8), Eiji Kuriiwa conducted an investigation and identified the site as a keyhole-shaped Kofun.
The mound, believed to have been constructed in the early [[:en:5th century|5th century]], yielded burial goods including gri11ed [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]] (cylindrical Haniwa), marking it as the sixth example of such finds in Japan.
== Overview ==
* type: [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] * area: ** Total length: approx. 52m ** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m ** Rear circle height: 3.5m ** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m ** Front projection height: 1.5m
<gallery widths="200px"> 庚申塚古墳２.jpg|Close view of Kōshinzuka Kofun 庚申塚古墳３.jpg|Stone monument 庚申塚古墳４.jpg|Kōshin-tō </gallery>
== location ==
* Nagano Prefecture, Kamiminochi District, [[:en:Iizuna|Iizuna Town]], Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1
== Transportation Access ==
* Nearest Station: [[:en:Shinano Railway|Shinano Railway]] [[:en:Mure Station|Mure Station]] (Approx. 8 minutes by car)
== References ==
* Mure Village History and School History Compilation Committee, *Mure Village History* (Vol. 1), pp. 419–420, 817. == See Also ==
* {{ill|Tankakyō|ja|丹霞郷|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tankakyō|qq=|1=Tankakyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17212811}} * {{ill|List of Kofuns in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofuns in Japan|qq=|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}}
{{Japanese-history-stub}}
{{Kofun navbar}}

{{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]]
|name = Kōshinzuka Kofun
|image = [[File:庚申塚古墳１.jpg|250px|Full view of Kōshinzuka Kofun]]
|location = [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]][[:en:Iizuna|Iizuna Town]] Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1
|location = {{coord|36|43|22|N|138|15|01|E|map_size:20000}}
|type = [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]
|built = Early [[:en:5th century|5th century]]
|area = Total length: approx. 52m; Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m
|Buried Person = Unknown
|burial goods = Gri11ed [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]] ({{ill|Cylindrical Haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cylindrical Haniwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Cylindrical Haniwa|qq=}})
|Historic Site designation1 = Town (typeerly village) Historic Site1 in [[1980]] (Showa 55)
}}
'''Kōshinzuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳) is a [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] located in [[:en:Iizuna|Iizuna Town]], [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]].

The mound is named "Kōshinzuka" because an ancient {{ill|Kōshin-tō|ja|庚申塔|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin-tō|qq=}} was enshrined on it. In [[:en:1933|1933]] (Showa 8), Eiji Kuriiwa conducted an investigation and identified the site as a keyhole-shaped Kofun.

The mound, believed to have been constructed in the early [[:en:5th century|5th century]], yielded burial goods including gri11ed [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]] (cylindrical Haniwa), marking it as the sixth example of such finds in Japan.

== Overview ==

* type: [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]
* area:
** Total length: approx. 52m
** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m
** Rear circle height: 3.5m
** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m
** Front projection height: 1.5m

<gallery widths="200px">
庚申塚古墳２.jpg|Close view of Kōshinzuka Kofun
庚申塚古墳３.jpg|Stone monument
庚申塚古墳４.jpg|Kōshin-tō
</gallery>

== location ==

* Nagano Prefecture, Kamiminochi District, [[:en:Iizuna|Iizuna Town]], Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1

== Transportation Access ==

* Nearest Station: [[:en:Shinano Railway|Shinano Railway]] [[:en:Mure Station|Mure Station]] (Approx. 8 minutes by car)

== References ==

* Mure Village History and School History Compilation Committee, *Mure Village History* (Vol. 1), pp. 419–420, 817.
== See Also ==

{{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]]
|name = Kōshinzuka Kofun
|image = [[File:庚申塚古墳１.jpg|250px|Full view of Kōshinzuka Kofun]]
|location = [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]][[:en:Iizuna|Iizuna Town]] Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1
|location = {{coord|36|43|22|N|138|15|01|E|map_size:20000}}
|type = [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]
|built = Early [[:en:5th century|5th century]]
|area = Total length: approx. 52m; Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m
|Buried Person = Unknown
|burial goods = Gri11ed [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]] ({{ill|Cylindrical Haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cylindrical Haniwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Cylindrical Haniwa|qq=}})
|Historic Site designation1 = Town (typeerly village) Historic Site1 in [[1980]] (Showa 55)
}}
'''Kōshinzuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳) is a [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] located in [[:en:Iizuna|Iizuna Town]], [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]].

The mound is named "Kōshinzuka" because an ancient {{ill|Kōshin-tō|ja|庚申塔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin-tō|qq=}} was enshrined on it. In [[:en:1933|1933]] (Showa 8), Eiji Kuriiwa conducted an investigation and identified the site as a keyhole-shaped Kofun.

The mound, believed to have been constructed in the early [[:en:5th century|5th century]], yielded burial goods including gri11ed [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]] (cylindrical Haniwa), marking it as the sixth example of such finds in Japan.

== Overview ==

* type: [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]
* area:
** Total length: approx. 52m
** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m
** Rear circle height: 3.5m
** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m
** Front projection height: 1.5m

<gallery widths="200px">
庚申塚古墳２.jpg|Close view of Kōshinzuka Kofun
庚申塚古墳３.jpg|Stone monument
庚申塚古墳４.jpg|Kōshin-tō
</gallery>

== location ==

* Nagano Prefecture, Kamiminochi District, [[:en:Iizuna|Iizuna Town]], Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1

== Transportation Access ==

* Nearest Station: [[:en:Shinano Railway|Shinano Railway]] [[:en:Mure Station|Mure Station]] (Approx. 8 minutes by car)

== References ==

* Mure Village History and School History Compilation Committee, *Mure Village History* (Vol. 1), pp. 419–420, 817.
== See Also ==

* {{ill|Tankakyō|ja|丹霞郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tankakyō|1=Tankakyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17212811}}

{{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]]
|name = Kōshinzuka Kofun
|image = [[File:庚申塚古墳１.jpg|250px|Full view of Kōshinzuka Kofun]]
|location = [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]][[:en:Iizuna|Iizuna Town]] Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1
|location = {{coord|36|43|22|N|138|15|01|E|map_size:20000}}
|type = [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]
|built = Early [[:en:5th century|5th century]]
|area = Total length: approx. 52m; Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m
|Buried Person = Unknown
|burial goods = Gri11ed [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]] ({{ill|Cylindrical Haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cylindrical Haniwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Cylindrical Haniwa|qq=}})
|Historic Site designation1 = Town (typeerly village) Historic Site1 in [[1980]] (Showa 55)
}}
'''Kōshinzuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳) is a [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] located in [[:en:Iizuna|Iizuna Town]], [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]].

The mound is named "Kōshinzuka" because an ancient {{ill|Kōshin-tō|ja|庚申塔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin-tō|qq=}} was enshrined on it. In [[:en:1933|1933]] (Showa 8), Eiji Kuriiwa conducted an investigation and identified the site as a keyhole-shaped Kofun.

The mound, believed to have been constructed in the early [[:en:5th century|5th century]], yielded burial goods including gri11ed [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]] (cylindrical Haniwa), marking it as the sixth example of such finds in Japan.

== Overview ==

* type: [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]
* area:
** Total length: approx. 52m
** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m
** Rear circle height: 3.5m
** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m
** Front projection height: 1.5m

<gallery widths="200px">
庚申塚古墳２.jpg|Close view of Kōshinzuka Kofun
庚申塚古墳３.jpg|Stone monument
庚申塚古墳４.jpg|Kōshin-tō
</gallery>

== location ==

* Nagano Prefecture, Kamiminochi District, [[:en:Iizuna|Iizuna Town]], Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1

== Transportation Access ==

* Nearest Station: [[:en:Shinano Railway|Shinano Railway]] [[:en:Mure Station|Mure Station]] (Approx. 8 minutes by car)

== References ==

* Mure Village History and School History Compilation Committee, *Mure Village History* (Vol. 1), pp. 419–420, 817.
== See Also ==

* {{ill|Tankakyō|ja|丹霞郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tankakyō|1=Tankakyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17212811}}

{{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]]
|name = Kōshinzuka Kofun
|image = [[File:庚申塚古墳１.jpg|250px|Full view of Kōshinzuka Kofun]]
|location = [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]][[:en:Iizuna|Iizuna Town]] Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1
|location = {{coord|36|43|22|N|138|15|01|E|map_size:20000}}
|type = [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]
|built = Early [[:en:5th century|5th century]]
|area = Total length: approx. 52m; Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m
|Buried Person = Unknown
|burial goods = Gri11ed [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]] ({{ill|Cylindrical Haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cylindrical Haniwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Cylindrical Haniwa|qq=}})
|Historic Site designation1 = Town (typeerly village) Historic Site1 in [[1980]] (Showa 55)
}}
'''Kōshinzuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳) is a [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] located in [[:en:Iizuna|Iizuna Town]], [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]].

The mound is named "Kōshinzuka" because an ancient {{ill|Kōshin-tō|ja|庚申塔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin-tō|qq=}} was enshrined on it. In [[:en:1933|1933]] (Showa 8), Eiji Kuriiwa conducted an investigation and identified the site as a keyhole-shaped Kofun.

The mound, believed to have been constructed in the early [[:en:5th century|5th century]], yielded burial goods including gri11ed [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]] (cylindrical Haniwa), marking it as the sixth example of such finds in Japan.

== Overview ==

* type: [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]]
* area:
** Total length: approx. 52m
** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m
** Rear circle height: 3.5m
** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m
** Front projection height: 1.5m

<gallery widths="200px">
庚申塚古墳２.jpg|Close view of Kōshinzuka Kofun
庚申塚古墳３.jpg|Stone monument
庚申塚古墳４.jpg|Kōshin-tō
</gallery>

== location ==

* Nagano Prefecture, Kamiminochi District, [[:en:Iizuna|Iizuna Town]], Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1

== Transportation Access ==

* Nearest Station: [[:en:Shinano Railway|Shinano Railway]] [[:en:Mure Station|Mure Station]] (Approx. 8 minutes by car)

== References ==

* Mure Village History and School History Compilation Committee, *Mure Village History* (Vol. 1), pp. 419–420, 817.
== See Also ==

* {{ill|Tankakyō|ja|丹霞郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tankakyō|1=Tankakyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17212811}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Koushinzuka-kofun (Nagano-Iizuna)]][[ja:庚申塚古墳 (飯綱町)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[commons:Category:Koushinzuka-kofun (Nagano-Iizuna)]][[ja:庚申塚古墳 (飯綱町)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[sn:commons:Category:Koushinzuka-kofun (Nagano-Iizuna)]][[ja:庚申塚古墳 (飯綱町)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q93325955]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:22, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:49, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}}
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:01, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}}
{{Multiple Issues | Refs Needed = June 2023 | Single Source = June 2023 }} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Kōshinzuka Kofun |image = [[File:庚申塚古墳１.jpg|250px|Full view of Kōshinzuka Kofun]] |location = [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]][[:en:Iizuna|Iizuna Town]] Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1 |location = {{coord|36|43|22|N|138|15|01|E|map_size:20000}} |type = [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] |built = Early [[:en:5th century|5th century]] |area = Total length: approx. 52m; Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m |Buried Person = Unknown |burial goods = Gri11ed [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]] ({{ill|Cylindrical Haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cylindrical Haniwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Cylindrical Haniwa|qq=}}) |Historic Site designation1 = Town (typeerly village) Historic Site1 in [[1980]] (Showa 55) }} '''Kōshinzuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳) is a [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] located in [[:en:Iizuna|Iizuna Town]], [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]].
The mound is named "Kōshinzuka" because an ancient {{ill|Kōshin-tō|ja|庚申塔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin-tō|qq=}} was enshrined on it. In [[:en:1933|1933]] (Showa 8), Eiji Kuriiwa conducted an investigation and identified the site as a keyhole-shaped Kofun.
The mound, believed to have been constructed in the early [[:en:5th century|5th century]], yielded burial goods including gri11ed [[:en:Haniwa|Haniwa]] (cylindrical Haniwa), marking it as the sixth example of such finds in Japan.
== Overview ==
* type: [[:en:Zenpokoenfun|Zenpokoenfun]] * area: ** Total length: approx. 52m ** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m ** Rear circle height: 3.5m ** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m ** Front projection height: 1.5m
<gallery widths="200px"> 庚申塚古墳２.jpg|Close view of Kōshinzuka Kofun 庚申塚古墳３.jpg|Stone monument 庚申塚古墳４.jpg|Kōshin-tō </gallery>
== location ==
* Nagano Prefecture, Kamiminochi District, [[:en:Iizuna|Iizuna Town]], Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1
== Transportation Access ==
* Nearest Station: [[:en:Shinano Railway|Shinano Railway]] [[:en:Mure Station|Mure Station]] (Approx. 8 minutes by car)
== References ==
* Mure Village History and School History Compilation Committee, *Mure Village History* (Vol. 1), pp. 419–420, 817. == See Also ==
* {{ill|Tankakyō|ja|丹霞郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tankakyō|1=Tankakyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17212811}} * {{ill|List of Kofuns in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofuns in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}}
{{Japanese-history-stub}}
{{Kofun navbar}}
{{translated page|ja|庚申塚古墳 (飯綱町)|version=95551769|comment=Imported full ja history}}
{{draft categories|
}}

| Single Source = June 2023
}}
{{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]]
|name = Kōshinzuka Kofun
|image = [[File:庚申塚古墳１.jpg|250px|Full view of Kōshinzuka Kofun]]
|location = {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture}}{{ill|Iizuna|en|Iizuna|WD=Q772034|lt=Iizuna Town}} Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1
|location = {{coord|36|43|22|N|138|15|01|E|map_size:20000}}
|type = {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|WD=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun}}
|built = Early {{ill|5th century|en|5th century|WD=Q8095|lt=5th century}}
|area = Total length: approx. 52m; Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m
|Buried Person = Unknown
|burial goods = Gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|en|Haniwa|WD=Q849376|lt=Haniwa}} ({{ill|Cylindrical Haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cylindrical Haniwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Cylindrical Haniwa|qq=}})
|Historic Site designation1 = Town (typeerly village) Historic Site1 in [[1980]] (Showa 55)
}}
'''Kōshinzuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳) is a {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|WD=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun}} located in {{ill|Iizuna|en|Iizuna|WD=Q772034|lt=Iizuna Town}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture}}.

The mound is named "Kōshinzuka" because an ancient {{ill|Kōshin-tō|ja|庚申塔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin-tō|qq=}} was enshrined on it. In {{ill|1933|en|1933|WD=Q18726|lt=1933}} (Showa 8), Eiji Kuriiwa conducted an investigation and identified the site as a keyhole-shaped Kofun.

The mound, believed to have been constructed in the early {{ill|5th century|en|5th century|WD=Q8095|lt=5th century}}, yielded burial goods including gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|en|Haniwa|WD=Q849376|lt=Haniwa}} (cylindrical Haniwa), marking it as the sixth example of such finds in Japan.

== Overview ==

* type: {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|WD=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun}}
* area:
** Total length: approx. 52m
** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m
** Rear circle height: 3.5m
** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m
** Front projection height: 1.5m

<gallery widths="200px">
庚申塚古墳２.jpg|Close view of Kōshinzuka Kofun
庚申塚古墳３.jpg|Stone monument
庚申塚古墳４.jpg|Kōshin-tō
</gallery>

== location ==

* Nagano Prefecture, Kamiminochi District, {{ill|Iizuna|en|Iizuna|WD=Q772034|lt=Iizuna Town}}, Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1

== Transportation Access ==

* Nearest Station: {{ill|Shinano Railway|en|Shinano Railway|WD=Q11254401|lt=Shinano Railway}} {{ill|Mure Station|en|Mure Station|WD=Q5356170|lt=Mure Station}} (Approx. 8 minutes by car)

== References ==

* Mure Village History and School History Compilation Committee, *Mure Village History* (Vol. 1), pp. 419–420, 817.
== See Also ==

* {{ill|Tankakyō|ja|丹霞郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tankakyō|1=Tankakyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17212811}}
* {{ill|List of Kofuns in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofuns in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}}

{{Japanese-history-stub}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[co:commons:Category:Koushinzuka-kofun (Nagano-Iizuna)]][[ja:庚申塚古墳 (飯綱町)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[co:commons:Category:Koushinzuka-kofun (Nagano-Iizuna)]][[ja:庚申塚古墳 (飯綱町)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[sn:commons:Category:Koushinzuka-kofun (Nagano-Iizuna)]][[ja:庚申塚古墳 (飯綱町)]]
{{Multiple Issues | Refs Needed = June 2023 | Single Source = June 2023 }} {{Infobox ancient site|type = [[Zenpokoenfun]] |name = Kōshinzuka Kofun |image = [[File:庚申塚古墳１.jpg|250px|Full view of Kōshinzuka Kofun]] |location = {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture}}{{ill|Iizuna|en|Iizuna|WD=Q772034|lt=Iizuna Town}} Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1 |location = {{coord|36|43|22|N|138|15|01|E|map_size:20000}} |type = {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|WD=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun}} |built = Early {{ill|5th century|en|5th century|WD=Q8095|lt=5th century}} |area = Total length: approx. 52m; Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m |Buried Person = Unknown |burial goods = Gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|en|Haniwa|WD=Q849376|lt=Haniwa}} ({{ill|Cylindrical Haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Cylindrical Haniwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Cylindrical Haniwa|qq=}}) |Historic Site designation1 = Town (typeerly village) Historic Site1 in [[1980]] (Showa 55) }} '''Kōshinzuka Kofun''' (庚申塚古墳) is a {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|WD=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun}} located in {{ill|Iizuna|en|Iizuna|WD=Q772034|lt=Iizuna Town}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture}}.
The mound is named "Kōshinzuka" because an ancient {{ill|Kōshin-tō|ja|庚申塔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin-tō|qq=}} was enshrined on it. In {{ill|1933|en|1933|WD=Q18726|lt=1933}} (Showa 8), Eiji Kuriiwa conducted an investigation and identified the site as a keyhole-shaped Kofun.
The mound, believed to have been constructed in the early {{ill|5th century|en|5th century|WD=Q8095|lt=5th century}}, yielded burial goods including gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|en|Haniwa|WD=Q849376|lt=Haniwa}} (cylindrical Haniwa), marking it as the sixth example of such finds in Japan.
== Overview ==
* type: {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|WD=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun}} * area: ** Total length: approx. 52m ** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m ** Rear circle height: 3.5m ** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m ** Front projection height: 1.5m
<gallery widths="200px"> 庚申塚古墳２.jpg|Close view of Kōshinzuka Kofun 庚申塚古墳３.jpg|Stone monument 庚申塚古墳４.jpg|Kōshin-tō </gallery>
== location ==
* Nagano Prefecture, Kamiminochi District, {{ill|Iizuna|en|Iizuna|WD=Q772034|lt=Iizuna Town}}, Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1
== Transportation Access ==
* Nearest Station: {{ill|Shinano Railway|en|Shinano Railway|WD=Q11254401|lt=Shinano Railway}} {{ill|Mure Station|en|Mure Station|WD=Q5356170|lt=Mure Station}} (Approx. 8 minutes by car)
== References ==
* Mure Village History and School History Compilation Committee, *Mure Village History* (Vol. 1), pp. 419–420, 817. == See Also ==
* {{ill|Tankakyō|ja|丹霞郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tankakyō|1=Tankakyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17212811}} * {{ill|List of Kofuns in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofuns in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11505809}}
{{Japanese-history-stub}}

The mound is named "Kōshinzuka" because an ancient {{ill|Kōshin-tō|ja|庚申塔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin-tō|qq=}} was enshrined on it. In {{ill|1933|en|1933|WD=Q18726|lt=1933|1=1933}} (Showa 8), Eiji Kuriiwa conducted an investigation and identified the site as a keyhole-shaped Kofun.
The mound, believed to have been constructed in the early {{ill|5th century|en|5th century|WD=Q8095|lt=5th century|1=5th century}}, yielded burial goods including gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|en|Haniwa|WD=Q849376|lt=Haniwa|1=Haniwa}} (cylindrical Haniwa), marking it as the sixth example of such finds in Japan.
== Overview ==
* type: {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|WD=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun}} * area: ** Total length: approx. 52m ** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m ** Rear circle height: 3.5m ** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m ** Front projection height: 1.5m
<gallery widths="200px"> 庚申塚古墳２.jpg|Close view of Kōshinzuka Kofun 庚申塚古墳３.jpg|Stone monument 庚申塚古墳４.jpg|Kōshin-tō </gallery>
== location ==
* Nagano Prefecture, Kamiminochi District, {{ill|Iizuna|en|Iizuna|WD=Q772034|lt=Iizuna Town|1=Iizuna}}, Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1
== Transportation Access ==
* Nearest Station: {{ill|Shinano Railway|en|Shinano Railway|WD=Q11254401|lt=Shinano Railway|1=Shinano Railway}} {{ill|Mure Station|en|Mure Station|WD=Q5356170|lt=Mure Station|1=Mure Station}} (Approx. 8 minutes by car)

* Mure Village History and School History Compilation Committee, *Mure Village History* (Vol. 1), pp. 419–420, 817.

The mound, believed to have been constructed in the early {{ill|5th century|en|5th century|qid=Q8095|lt=5th century|1=5th century}}, yielded burial goods including gri11ed {{ill|Haniwa|en|Haniwa|qid=Q849376|lt=Haniwa|1=Haniwa}} (cylindrical Haniwa), marking it as the sixth example of such finds in Japan.
== Overview ==
* type: {{ill|Zenpōkōenfun|en|Zenpōkōenfun|qid=Q11268718|lt=Zenpōkōenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun}} * area: ** Total length: approx. 52m ** Rear circle diameter: approx. 31m ** Rear circle height: 3.5m ** Front projection width: approx. 15–17m ** Front projection height: 1.5m
<gallery widths="200px"> 庚申塚古墳２.jpg|Close view of Kōshinzuka Kofun 庚申塚古墳３.jpg|Stone monument 庚申塚古墳４.jpg|Kōshin-tō </gallery>
== location ==
* Nagano Prefecture, Kamiminochi District, {{ill|Iizuna|en|Iizuna|qid=Q772034|lt=Iizuna Town|1=Iizuna}}, Hirade, Nishinura 1007-1, 1008-1
== Transportation Access ==
* Nearest Station: {{ill|Shinano Railway|en|Shinano Railway|qid=Q11254401|lt=Shinano Railway|1=Shinano Railway}} {{ill|Mure Station|en|Mure Station|qid=Q5356170|lt=Mure Station|1=Mure Station}} (Approx. 8 minutes by car)
== References ==
* Mure Village History and School History Compilation Committee, *Mure Village History* (Vol. 1), pp. 419–420, 817.
== See Also ==
* {{ill|Tankakyō|ja|丹霞郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tankakyō|1=Tankakyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17212811}} * {{ill|List of Kofuns in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofuns in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11505809}}
